items.name: Fortuna's Wheel
items.description:
Crafted from radiant gold and adorned with a striking red-and-black roulette design, this timepiece exudes opulence and fortune. With only 111 pieces ever created, this exclusive item is a symbol of rarity and prestige.
Perfect for those who dare to dream big, Fortuna's Wheel is more than a watch—it's a statement of timeless success.

Limited Edition (#111/111).
